task_language: Pick the orange juice and place it in the basket
strategy_notes: Two-camera perception-isolated solve. (1) AGENTVIEW localization at step 00: searched image_cam_00.png for orange/yellow pixels (RGB filter r>120,g 50-150,b<80) — orange juice carton cluster at (row~100, col~143), world_00[100,143]=(-0.142, 0.054, top z=0.143). Basket interior at world_00 rows 115-125, cols 195-210, x=-0.06 to -0.05, y=0.25, z=0.04-0.09 (rim z~0.12). (2) Attempt 1 (steps 1-5): pi0_pick from home succeeded grasping OJ carton (gripper_qpos 0.053 = holding ~5cm-wide carton, wrist cam image_wrist_01 confirms 'ORANGE JUICE' label held); carried to (-0.065, 0.264, 0.30) and released — OJ missed basket. Diagnosis: agentview localized basket center at x=-0.065 but that's actually the BACK rim (agentview ±8-13cm error), true basket interior center is x~0 (rims at x=-0.07 back, x=+0.07 front). (3) Reset + attempt 2 (steps 7-9) Pi0 grabbed air on rung 1, then full-task-language prompt grasped OJ but Pi0 chose its own xy (0.007, 0.282) outside basket. (4) Reset + attempt 3 (steps 11-16): pi0_pick 'pick up the orange juice' succeeded (gripper_qpos 0.056, wrist image confirmed OJ carton held); set_gripper +1 to firm; lifted to z=0.30; moved to (0,0.25,0.30) then refined to (0.04,0.27,0.22) using WRIST cam (world_wrist_14.npy: basket interior bottom at x~0.02, y~0.26, z=0.01-0.08, rim at z=0.13 — overrides agentview by 5-7cm in x); wrist image_wrist_15.png visually verified OJ centered directly over basket opening; release fired libero_terminated=true.

perception_summary.lesson: agentview ±8-13cm flipped basket center estimate (-0.06 -> 0.04 true), wrist cam corrected after carry
